spells.name: List the Living
spells.lore: Reveals all processes currently running on the system.

spells.name: Banish Process
spells.lore: Forcefully terminates a process by its ID. Use with caution.

spells.name: Scry the Ports
spells.lore: Shows all open ports and the processes listening on them.

spells.name: Conjure Container
spells.lore: Summons an ephemeral container that vanishes when dismissed.

spells.name: Bind the Port
spells.lore: Summons a container and binds a local port to it.

spells.name: Read the Scrolls
spells.lore: Follows the live log output of a systemd service.

spellbooks.name: Tome of your mom
spellbooks.cover: Spells for observing and inspecting the system.

spellbooks.name: whales?
spellbooks.cover: Spells for summoning and managing whales.
